name: scalable-api-testing-framework-newman-ci-cd
description: Production-grade API Automation Testing Framework using Postman & Newman for SaaS/e-commerce backends
author: QA Automation Engineer

scripts.test:newman:dev: newman run collections/SaaS_API_Full_Suite.postman_collection.json --environment environments/dev.postman_environment.json --reporters cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/html/dev-report.html --reporter-htmlextra-title "SaaS API Test Report - DEV" --reporter-htmlextra-darkTheme
scripts.test:newman:staging: newman run collections/SaaS_API_Full_Suite.postman_collection.json --environment environments/staging.postman_environment.json --reporters cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/html/staging-report.html --reporter-htmlextra-title "SaaS API Test Report - STAGING" --reporter-htmlextra-darkTheme
scripts.test:newman:users: newman run collections/01_Auth.postman_collection.json --environment environments/dev.postman_environment.json --export-environment environments/dev.runtime.json && newman run collections/02_Users.postman_collection.json --environment environments/dev.runtime.json --reporters cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/html/users-report.html
scripts.test:newman:products: newman run collections/01_Auth.postman_collection.json --environment environments/dev.postman_environment.json --export-environment environments/dev.runtime.json && newman run collections/03_Products.postman_collection.json --environment environments/dev.runtime.json --reporters cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/html/products-report.html
scripts.test:newman:cart: newman run collections/01_Auth.postman_collection.json --environment environments/dev.postman_environment.json --export-environment environments/dev.runtime.json && newman run collections/04_Cart.postman_collection.json --environment environments/dev.runtime.json --reporters cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/html/cart-report.html
scripts.lint: echo 'No linting required for JSON collections'
scripts.clean: rimraf reports/html reports/allure-results reports/allure-report && mkdir -p reports/html reports/allure-results
